narratives.narrative_name: URW: Blaming the war on others rather than the invader
narratives.evidence_quote: इसी वजह से स्थिति सुधरने के बजाय और ज्यादा बिगड़ती जा रही है.
narratives.reasoning: The quote attributes the worsening situation to Ukraine's refusal of Russia's 'neutral country' proposal, shifting blame for the continued conflict away from Russia's invasion and onto Ukraine's diplomatic stance.

narratives.evidence_quote: जर्मनी अभी भी रूस के खिलाफ कड़े प्रतिबंध लगाने से बच रहा है. उसे अपने देश की अर्थव्यवस्था की ज्यादा चिंता है. उसे डर लग रहा है कि रूस पर प्रतिबंध लगाने से जर्मनी को बड़ा आर्थिक नुकसान हो जाएगा.
narratives.reasoning: This statement criticizes Germany (a key Western nation) for prioritizing its own economy over taking strong action against Russia, portraying its diplomatic and economic stance as self-interested and weak.

narratives.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narratives.evidence_quote: उसे डर लग रहा है कि रूस पर प्रतिबंध लगाने से जर्मनी को बड़ा आर्थिक नुकसान हो जाएगा.
narratives.reasoning: The text highlights the fear of significant economic damage to Germany as a consequence of imposing sanctions on Russia, which aligns with the narrative of predicting adverse outcomes for Western countries.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Blaming the war on others rather than the invader: Ukraine is the aggressor
subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूस की तरफ से न्यूट्रल देश वाला प्रस्ताव जरूर रखा गया है, लेकिन यूक्रेन ने इसे मानने से साफ मना कर दिया है. इसी वजह से स्थिति सुधरने के बजाय और ज्यादा बिगड़ती जा रही है.
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly shifts blame for the continuation and worsening of the war onto Ukraine by stating that Ukraine's refusal of a Russian proposal (to be a neutral country) is the reason the situation is deteriorating, implying Ukraine is responsible for the escalation rather than Russia's invasion.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Blaming the war on others rather than the invader: The West are the aggressors
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन के राष्ट्रपति वोलोदिमिर जेलेंस्की इस समय पूरी दुनिया को रूस के खिलाफ एकजुट करने का प्रयास कर रहे हैं.
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement frames Zelenskyy's diplomatic efforts as an aggressive act of rallying the world against Russia, portraying the West's potential unified response not as a reaction to invasion but as an escalation driven by Ukraine and, by extension, the Western world he is appealing to.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: The EU is divided
subnarratives.evidence_quote: जेलेंस्की ने इस बात पर गुस्सा भी जाहिर किया कि जर्मनी अभी भी रूस के खिलाफ कड़े प्रतिबंध लगाने से बच रहा है. उसे अपने देश की अर्थव्यवस्था की ज्यादा चिंता है.
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote highlights Germany's hesitation to impose strong sanctions due to its own economic concerns, presenting the EU not as a unified bloc but as a collection of nations with divided priorities and self-interest, which aligns with the subnarrative of a divided EU.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: The West does not care about Ukraine, only about its interests
subnarratives.evidence_quote: उसे अपने देश की अर्थव्यवस्था की ज्यादा चिंता है. उसे डर लग रहा है कि रूस पर प्रतिबंध लगाने से जर्मनी को बड़ा आर्थिक नुकसान हो जाएगा.
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement frames Germany's (and by extension, the West's) primary concern as its own economic well-being rather than Ukraine's fate, suggesting support is conditional and self-serving, which matches the subnarrative that the West cares only about its own interests.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: Diplomacy does/will not work
subnarratives.evidence_quote: बातचीत से कोई रास्ता नहीं निकला है और कीव को लेकर आर-पार की जंग देखने को मिल रही है.
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly states that talks/diplomacy have yielded no solution and that an all-out war is ongoing, which discredits the effectiveness and potential of diplomatic efforts, fitting the subnarrative definition.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West: Sanctions imposed by Western countries will backfire
subnarratives.evidence_quote: उसे डर लग रहा है कि रूस पर प्रतिबंध लगाने से जर्मनी को बड़ा आर्थिक नुकसान हो जाएगा।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly states that Germany fears significant economic damage from imposing sanctions on Russia, which aligns with the subnarrative that Western sanctions will have negative, backfiring consequences.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: उसे अपने देश की अर्थव्यवस्था की ज्यादा चिंता है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement supports the parent narrative by highlighting Germany's primary concern for its own economy over taking strong action against Russia, implying a negative consequence (prioritization of self-interest/economic stability) for the West's unity and moral stance. It is a distinct argument not covered by the specific 'sanctions backfire' or 'refugee flows' subnarratives.
